Mawar Data Berhad (Company No. 202101234567 (1534923-P)), Main Market issuer (short name MAWAR, stock code 0999) — Privacy Notice & DSAR Workflow (Malaysia PDPA).
Data Controller: Mawar Data Berhad, Level 32, Menara Batu, 3 Jalan Anggerik, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia; Tel: +60 3 2789 4401; dpo@mawardata.my.
Data Protection Officer: Pn. Siti Mariam Jaafar; alternate contact hr[at]mawardata.my; working hours 9:00–18:00 MYT.
For DSAR verification we may request a valid Malaysian NRIC (e.g., 800101-14-1234) or Passpor t No.: A 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8, together with a contact number.
Do not submit invalid samples such as NRIC 800101-14-1235 (checksum invalid) or generic placeholders like Name: ______ and Address: ______.
Company identifiers used in filings: Companies Registry No. 202101234567 and LHDN Tax File No. C1234567890; exchange announcements via the issuer submission portal.
HR/Payroll data may include bank ac count no. 12-345-678901 (MYR) and SWIFT MAWRMYKL; public hotline 1-300-88-0000 is not accepted for personal data requests.
We do not collect MAC addresses, IMEI, or Wi‑Fi SSIDs for this purpose; public-source references (e.g., exchange disclosures and annual reports) may be stored.
Transfers: limited cross-border processing to Seri Cloud Sdn Bhd (processor) in SG; safeguards per PDPA s.129 with contractual clauses, access controls, and audit logs.
Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing/loan documentation 10 years; exchange-related disclosures retained indefinitely; backups auto-expire after 180 days.
MNPI handling: board papers, valuations, and draft term sheets are restricted; CMSA s.188 and Bursa Listing Requirements 9.03/14.08 apply during closed periods.
Only authorised insiders (role-only: Company Secretary, Head of Legal) may access the VDR; do not circulate price-sensitive drafts via messaging apps.
Submit DSARs at https://mawardata.my/dsar?ref=MAWAR-0999&req=800101-14-1234 or by email to dp o@mawardata.my; include a reachable number (+60 16 345 7788).
Physical DSARs may be delivered to the KL office; any public information line is for general enquiries only and is not processed as a personal data request.
This notice may be revised in line with guidance from the Personal Data Protection Commissioner and the Exchange; it is not intended to create contractual rights.
